name: Implementation
about: Track a concrete implementation task

labels:

  - type:implementation

## Problem

What user, operator, or architectural problem is this fixing?

## Scope

- [ ] Concrete work item

## Dependencies

List any RFCs, epics, or prerequisite issues.

## Cleanup / Superseded Paths

What existing code, flags, adapters, or compatibility paths should be deleted, consolidated, or explicitly deferred?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Observable outcome is clear
- [ ] Tests/verification are defined
- [ ] Docs/config/operator guidance updated if needed

## Test Plan

How should this be validated locally and in CI?
